name: Greens Club Spokane
address: 8701 N Division St Suite E, Spokane, WA 99218
about: Greens Club Spokane is a private golf lounge featuring premium TrackMan simulators with 24/7 access for members. Located in North Spokane, it offers a climate-controlled environment for year-round golf practice and play. The facility combines technology with luxury amenities, including a private bar, pool table, and putting green, providing an exclusive space for both serious practice and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for realistic ball and swing tracking
24/7 access with no weather restrictions or booking hassles
Exclusive member-only environment ensuring a quiet, professional atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Members can bring their own food or drinks
Beer and wine available in the fridge for members

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art radar technology for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members should bring their own clubs to use with the TrackMan simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members are allowed to bring their own food and beverages. The facility also has a fridge with beer and wine available for members.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to play 18 holes varies depending on simulator usage and pace of play, but members have unlimited access during operating hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Greens Club is a private adult-oriented lounge focused on serious golf practice and social gatherings, not designed for children.
